question: The chart shows regional sales share. Which statement is correct according to the data labels on the chart?

options.A: West has the largest market share among the regions shown.
options.B: Central has the largest market share among the regions shown.
options.C: North and East have the same market share.
options.D: South has a larger share than Central.

explanation: From the labels, Central has the highest share (29%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Central is largest when relying on visual comparison.
